creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Hi Nuno,

Sorry for the silence on this!

i386 support very much seems to be on the way out, so maybe we should do
NOT_FOR_ARCHS+=	i386
?

While I do not see it explicitly stated anywhere upstream, the impression I am getting is the same tiering of supported platforms as on FreeBSD 15.x onwards, i.e. amd64 and aarch64 as tier 1 with a moderate interest in armv7 and some flavours of powerpc as tier 2.

Cheers from 
Erik
